name: In Utah like West Jordan, how do they prove fault in chemical spill cases?

mainEntity.name: In Utah like West Jordan, how do they prove fault in chemical spill cases?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Fault via negligence: no PPE, ignored warnings, improper storage.** OSHA violations evidence employer breach.[3][2] Proves via inspections, witnesses. Workers' comp no-fault, but third-party needs it. Document violations.
